case_title: JOHONSON DEALIVIA VS MAO PEN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY JOHONSON DEALIVIA AS TO DEFENDANT MAO PEN THOEU PEN STATE FARM INS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
